beIN 4K.original_title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Just 14% of Liverpool’s away league goals this season have been scored in the first half, with only one of those coming before the 45th minute. In Premier League history, only three sides have a lower ratio of away goals in a season scored before half-time: West Brom in 2008-09, Leicester in 1994-95, and Southampton in 1998-99. Wolves haven’t scored before half time in any of their last nine Premier League games. Only once have they gone 10 games without a first half goal, doing so between August and November 2018.

beIN 4K.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.
